name: Chocolate Raspberry Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup seedless raspberry jam (works with preserv)
3/4 cup semisweet chocolate chips (DON'T vary from
10 oz frozen raspberries in syrup, thawed
recipeInstructions:
In a bowl, combine flour and confectioners' sugar; cut in butter until crumbly. Press into an ungreased 9-inch square baking pan. Bake at 375°F for 15-18 minutes or until golden brown. Spread jam over warm crust. In a small mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and milk until smooth. Add melted vanilla chips; beat until smooth. Spread carefully over jam layer. Cool completely. Chill until set, about 1 hour. For glaze, melt chocolate chips and shortening; spread over filling. Chill for 10 minutes. Cut into bars; chill another hour. Store in the refrigerator.
Yield: 3 dozen
